problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Ketamine-like. Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
